commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
And, is not in Hebrew.
Is. Hebrew, "but the perverse in his ways despiseth him "(Haydock) shewing by his conduct that he cares not for the Lord. (Calmet)
Septuagint, "he shall be dishonoured, that"

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: “He who walks straight, fears the Lord.” Not just any fear makes people walk straight, but the fear of God.… A life provided with virtue is quite illustrious, but the addition of fear makes persons more religious. Commentary on the Proverbs of Solomon, Fragment

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
